data.description: GOLD DECLINED AFTER SHIPS WERE FIRED UPON IN THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ OVER THE WEEKEND, REVIVING CONCERNS OVER ENERGY SUPPLY DISRUPTIONS.

GOLD DECLINED AFTER ATTACKS ON VESSELS IN THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ REIGNITED ENERGY SUPPLY FEARS, DRIVING OIL PRICES HIGHER AND LIFTING INFLATION EXPECTATIONS, WHICH REDUCED THE APPEAL OF NON-YIELDING ASSETS LIKE BULLION.

data.title: Ascentage Pharma to Present Four Promising Preclinical Studies Demonstrating the Potential of Combination Therapies at American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: Ascentage Pharma Group International, a biopharmaceutical company based in Rockville, Maryland and Suzhou, China, shared news on April 19, 2026, that they will showcase four preclinical studies at the American Association for Cancer Research 2026 Annual Meeting in San Diego. The company, traded on NASDAQ under AAPG and on HKEX as 6855, focuses on developing innovative therapies for cancer treatment. The AACR 2026 Annual Meeting, taking place from April 17 to 22, will feature Ascentage Pharma Group International's research in poster format.

data.title: Pulnovo Medical Announces Strategic Investment from Medtronic in oversubscribed $100 Million Financing Round
data.description: Pulnovo Medical, a company specializing in innovative treatments for Pulmonary Hypertension and Heart Failure, has recently secured a significant milestone. On April 19, 2026, the company disclosed the completion of a highly sought-after strategic funding round, raising a total of $100 million. This successful financing round was oversubscribed, indicating strong investor interest. Notably, a prominent investment was made by a leading entity as part of this round.

data.title: Faraday Future Announces $45 Million in New Financing with a U.S. Institutional Investor to Strongly Support the Execution of Its EAI Robotics & EAI EV Business; Plans to Pursue Long-Term Strategic Cooperation with the Investor for Mutual Benefit
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc., a California-based global company, disclosed a recent $45 million financing agreement with a U.S. institutional investor. The full amount was received promptly on the same day. This funding will greatly assist in advancing the company's Embodied AI ecosystem strategy.

data.title: SK hynix Begins Mass Production of 192GB SOCAMM2  'Setting a New Standard for AI Server Memory Performance'
data.description: A company has commenced mass production of high capacity products totaling 192GB specifically for the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform. These products aim to enhance power efficiency through the utilization of high density DRAM built on the newest 1cnm process. The company plans to work closely with NVIDIA to address bottlenecks in AI infrastructure and deliver optimized solutions.

data.title: Sutro Biopharma Presents Promising Preclinical Data Across its Pipeline of Next-Generation Single and Dual-Payload ADC Programs at AACR 2026
data.description: The drug STRO-004 has shown strong and consistent anti-cancer effects in various models of solid tumors expressing the targeted protein (TF), outperforming other similar antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) in terms of efficacy.
